headline: Alphabet’s US$80 Billion AI Build‑Out Funding Might Change The Case For Investing In Alphabet (GOOGL)
summary: In early June 2026, Alphabet Inc. moved to raise over US$80 billion for AI infrastructure via a mix of follow-on equity offerings, convertible and preferred fixed‑income securities, and a US$10 billion private placement from Berkshire Hathaway, while also appointing long‑time finance executive Marsida Saraci as Principal Accounting Officer. This large-scale capital raise, backed by a wide syndicate of underwriters and Moody’s credit‑positive view, signals Alphabet’s intention to finance an...

headline: Greg Abel Era At Berkshire Hathaway Shifts Capital Toward Housing And Tech
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B) under new CEO Greg Abel is reshaping its capital deployment approach. The company has agreed to acquire Taylor Morrison Home, increasing its direct ownership in an operating business. Berkshire has also made a large investment in Alphabet, adding a major technology and AI platform to its holdings. Berkshire Hathaway sits at the center of many portfolios, and at a share price of $489.25, NYSE:BRK.B often serves as a reference point for long term compounding...

headline: Alphabet’s New SpaceX Exposure Adds A Fresh Dimension To Its Story
summary: Alphabet's long held private stake in SpaceX has become a publicly traded position following SpaceX's historic IPO. The IPO turns Alphabet's multi billion dollar SpaceX investment into a liquid asset with a transparent market price. Investors can now see Alphabet's exposure to the commercial space and space focused AI cloud sector reflected in daily trading data. Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) now has a directly observable stake in one of the highest profile space infrastructure companies, which...
